name: edgrapi-skills
description: Agent skills for clean company financials from SEC EDGAR via Edgrapi.com
author: Edgrapi

skills.name: edgrapi-full
skills.description: Complete SEC EDGAR financials toolkit — normalized income/balance/cash-flow fundamentals, computed ratios, company profiles, and recent filings for any US-listed ticker.

skills.name: edgrapi-fundamentals
skills.description: Normalized financial statements and computed ratios (margins, returns, leverage, liquidity) for a ticker, parsed from SEC EDGAR XBRL.

skills.name: edgrapi-filings
skills.description: Company profiles (CIK, industry, fiscal-year end, exchange) and recent SEC filings (10-K/10-Q/8-K) with document links.
